plan.title: Time announcements double-fire at each interval

narratives.Description: At each scheduled interval boundary, the voice time announcement fires twice — same voice, milliseconds apart.
narratives.Overview: Distinct from #62 continual loop. Cadence is correct but each boundary speaks twice. Likely resync/enable re-enqueues the same future boundary onto the audio clock without canceling prior BufferSources, or dual AnnounceEngine instances.
narratives.Requirements:
FR-1: Each interval boundary produces exactly one audible announcement.
FR-2: No regression of the #62 continual-loop fix (committedBoundaryMs).
FR-3: resync still remaps wall→audio after suspend without leaving orphan schedules.
NFR-1: Regression coverage for the double-fire scenario.
narratives.LockedDecisions: Root cause: resync()/enable remapped a future committed boundary onto the audio clock without canceling prior BufferSources, so the same utterance fired twice ms apart. Fix: track pending BufferSources and stop them on resync/stop before re-scheduling; also guard ensureEngines with startingRef to prevent dual AnnounceEngine instances from concurrent callers.

references.title: Issue #73: Time announcements double-fire at each interval
